title: Kick streamer Clavicular faces viral moment after woman slaps him live during stream and police get involved
summary_full: Braden Clavicular went viral after a livestream showed a woman slapping him during an argument at a club. The incident happened on March 19, 2026, during his subathon stream. He later called the police and said he plans to press charges. The clip, shared on X by @Kick_Champ, continues to gain attention online.
